comptia-security+.title: CompTIA Security+
comptia-security+.content:
Notes from my CompTIA Security+ learning.
This page collects concepts related to security fundamentals, risk management, access control, cryptography, and incident response.
Related: Cybersecurity

cybersecurity.title: Cybersecurity
cybersecurity.content:
Cybersecurity is about understanding how systems break, how people make mistakes, and how to protect information from threats.
I became interested in cybersecurity through hands-on learning, internships, and studying security fundamentals.
Related: CompTIA Security+

index.title: Melania's Notes
index.content:
A peek inside my second brain — where I collect new things I learn, connect ideas, and document my growth as an engineering student.
Use search to explore what I’ve been learning.
